channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Point of Care Testing (non-IUS)
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Point of Care Testing (non-IUS)

item.title: ADVANTAGE: Advanced discovery of visceral analgesics by neuroimmune targets and the genetics of extreme human phenotype, a study protocol.
item.description: PloS one - Chronic visceral pain affects over 20% of adults globally but remains poorly understood, significantly impacting quality of life and healthcare costs. Limited understanding and diagnostic misconcep...
